message:
web: Redesign OG image layout and styling

- Reorder top section: user, agent+model, GitHub repo
- Add date with calendar icon to bottom left
- Show @username instead of display name
- Bump text sizes for better readability
- Normalize icon sizes to 20px

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ebp736w6g7kppyw4q0ei4md8

files.patch:
@@ -628,6 +628,7 @@ export async function getPublicTranscript(db: DrizzleDB, id: string) {
       linesRemoved: transcripts.linesRemoved,
       linesModified: transcripts.linesModified,
       userName: user.name,
+      userUsername: user.username,
       userImage: user.image,
       repoName: repos.repo,
     })
